story.iWant: rich, interactive space cards that reveal details on hover
story.soThat: I can see what's happening inside a room without entering it

tasks.task: CSS Token Extensions for SpaceCard - Add card-specific tokens to tokens.css, define space type gradients, extend tailwind.config.ts
SpaceCard Component Skeleton - Create SpaceCard.tsx preserving SpaceElement props, add new props for phase/activityLog/variant
Gradient Backgrounds - Create getSpaceGradient utility, map space types to gradients, apply as overlay with occupancy-based intensity
Phase Pill Component - Create PhasePill.tsx reusable component with theme token styling
Card Header and Meta Display - Space name, "{N} Active · {Phase}" format, beacon indicator placeholder, PhasePill integration
Hover Expansion and Details - Expanded state on hover, full avatars row, ActivityLogEntry component with monospace styling
Transition Animations - CSS transitions, translateY(-5px) scale(1.01), ease-elastic timing, shadow/border animation, z-index bump
Theme Compatibility Testing - Test all 4 themes (Neon, Zen, Obsidian, Paper), verify glass morphism effects
Integration with Floor Plan - Update DomFloorPlan to use SpaceCard, pass phase/activityLog props, preserve click-stop protocol
Unit Tests - Test renders, hover state, click handlers, phase pill, gradient backgrounds

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: New SpaceCard component implementing Orbit Gallery design, refactored from SpaceElement.tsx, supports all existing functionality
Gradient backgrounds based on space type/neighborhood using --vo-* tokens, intensity adjusts by occupancy
Phase pill displays agenda phase (Decide, Build, Ideate), styled with --vo-pill-* tokens
Card displays space name, occupancy count, phase pill with "{N} Active · {Phase}" format
Hover expands card showing full participant roster, agenda phase, activity log entry (monospace, border-left accent)
Smooth 200ms ease-elastic transitions, translateY(-5px) scale(1.01), shadow/border animation, no jarring changes
Theme-aware styling: inherits CSS variables from Story 3.1, adapts to all 4 themes, glass morphism per theme

docs.doc: Source of truth for SpaceCard styling. Contains .space-card, .phase-pill, .avatars-row, .log-stream CSS patterns and all [data-theme="*"] variable definitions.
SpaceCard component spec including anatomy, states (default, hover, live beacon, focus, loading), behavior (click enters, double-click dialog, hover fetches log), and accessibility requirements.
Original acceptance criteria and technical reference for SpaceCard V2.
Feature-based component organization pattern, floor-plan components in src/components/floor-plan/.
Previous story learnings: theme token system, VOThemeProvider, --vo-* prefix convention, glass morphism base tokens.
Click-stop protocol: data-avatar-interactive attributes, parent guard patterns, portal menu handling.

file.reason: Current implementation to refactor from. Contains props interface, click handling, space color logic, avatar display.
Avatar component to reuse for participant display. Uses EnhancedAvatarV2, handles click-stop protocol with data-avatar-interactive.
Parent component that renders SpaceElement grid. Must be updated to use SpaceCard instead.
Theme token system from Story 3.1. Already contains --vo-card-*, --vo-pill-*, --vo-log-bg tokens for all 4 themes.
Already extended with vo-* color utilities, boxShadow, and transition timing. May need additional card-specific utilities.
Existing badge component for occupancy count display.
Existing tooltip components for avatar tooltips.
Class name composition utility using clsx and tailwind-merge.
Type definitions for space and user presence data structures.
Theme hook exposing current theme, setTheme, themes array. Use for theme-aware styling decisions.
Theme context with theme constants and metadata.

constraints.constraint: Click-Stop Protocol: Mark interactive children with data-avatar-interactive. Parent click handler must early-return if target.closest('[data-avatar-interactive]') matches.
Strict TypeScript: Provide explicit types for props, state, params, and returns.
Anti-Duplication: Reuse existing components (UserAvatarPresence, Badge, Tooltip). Do not create new avatar components.
Theme Token Naming: Use --vo-* prefix for all Virtual Office tokens. Extend tokens.css, do not recreate.
File Size: Keep files under ~500 lines. Extract hooks or subcomponents if needed.
CSS Source of Truth: Extract styling patterns directly from ux-space-grid-v2.html. This file is authoritative for colors, gradients, shadows, and transitions.
Component Organization: New components go in src/components/floor-plan/ for floor-plan features, src/components/ui/ for reusable UI primitives.

tests.standards: Use Vitest as the test framework with React Testing Library for component tests. Follow existing patterns in __tests__/theme-system.test.tsx. Mock contexts (AuthContext, ThemeContext) as needed. Use vi.fn() for mock functions. Wrap components in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider for proper context.

ideas.idea: Test SpaceCard renders with minimal required props (space, usersInSpace, onEnterSpace)
Test SpaceCard preserves all SpaceElement functionality (click to enter, double-click, highlight state)
Test gradient background changes based on space.type
Test gradient intensity increases with higher usersInSpace count
Test PhasePill renders phase text correctly
Test PhasePill applies theme token styles
Test meta shows "{N} Active" format with correct count
Test hover state adds 'expanded' class or shows expanded content
Test hover shows all avatars (not limited to 8)
Test activity log entry renders with monospace font
Test hover applies transform styles (translateY, scale)
Test SpaceCard renders correctly in each theme (neon, zen, obsidian, paper)
Test glass morphism styles are applied when expected
Test click-stop protocol: clicking avatar does not trigger onEnterSpace
